allow: Bash(python3 -c "from pptx import Presentation; print\(''pptx available''\)")
Bash(python -c "from pptx import Presentation; print\(''pptx available''\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''''{len\(d\)} words loaded''''\)")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5000/api/calendar -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""date"":""2026-03-02"",""type"":""lesson"",""note"":""Chinese lesson with Barbora"",""time"":""18:00"",""repeat"":""weekly"",""repeatEnd"":""2026-05-01""}')

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; evts=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''''{len\(evts\)} events in March''''\); [print\(f''''  {e[""date""]} {e[""type""]} - {e[""note""]}''''\) for e in evts if e.get\(''''type''''\)==''''lesson'''']")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; evts=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''''{len\(evts\)} events in April''''\); [print\(f''''  {e[""date""]} {e[""type""]} - {e[""note""]}''''\) for e in evts]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; evts=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''''{len\(evts\)} events in May''''\); [print\(f''''  {e[""date""]}''''\) for e in evts]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; evts=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f''''{e[""date""]} \({__import__\(""datetime""\).date.fromisoformat\(e[""date""]\).strftime\(""%A""\)}\) - {e[""note""]}''''\) for e in evts]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; ws=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f''''  {w[""filename""]} \({w[""size_kb""]} KB\)''''\) for w in ws]")
